agent_context.gdd_prompt: Define boon choice UI: number of options, reroll rules, and preview of stat changes.
agent_context.summary_for_agents: Boon selection presents run upgrades with god tags and synergy hints.

design_guidance.designer_notes: Show synergy tags and stat preview before confirm.
design_guidance.when_to_use: When roguelike runs offer pick-one-of-three style upgrades mid-run.
design_guidance.where_to_use: Post-chamber reward, shrine, god encounter.

menus.name: Boons Menu
menus.shared_rationale: God boon choice after chamber clears.
menus.summary: Choose run modifiers or blessings during escape.

agent_context.gdd_prompt: List rebindable actions, default bindings per platform, conflict rules, and reset-to-default.
agent_context.summary_for_agents: Controls remap captures per-action bindings for gamepad, keyboard, and touch.

design_guidance.designer_notes: Show conflicts when two actions bind to the same key.
design_guidance.when_to_use: When games support multiple input devices or accessibility remapping.
design_guidance.where_to_use: Settings branch, first-launch prompt, pause options.

menus.name: Controls Remap Menu
menus.shared_rationale: Accessibility and player preference for input bindings across devices.
menus.summary: Rebind inputs for gamepad, keyboard, or touch.

agent_context.gdd_prompt: List recipes, material costs, station requirements, and discovery rules.
implementation_checklist: Add output item and play feedback
agent_context.summary_for_agents: Crafting menu validates material costs and outputs items; show recipes discovered vs hidden.

design_guidance.designer_notes: Grey out uncraftable recipes with material shortage hints.
when_to_avoid: When loot is only vendor trash without combination rules
design_guidance.when_to_use: When players combine materials into items at stations or benches.
design_guidance.where_to_use: Workbench UI, alchemy pot, cooking menu.

menus.name: Crafting Menu
menus.shared_rationale: Combine materials into gear or consumables.
menus.summary: Combine materials into gear or consumables.

agent_context.gdd_prompt: Define credit sections, scroll speed, skip input, and music bed.
implementation_checklist: Return to prior menu on end
agent_context.summary_for_agents: Credits scroll displays team, licensors, and tools; skippable from main or ending flow.

design_guidance.designer_notes: Support skip and auto-scroll speed; include licensed asset notices.
design_guidance.when_to_use: When shipping a commercial or collaborative project needing attribution.
design_guidance.where_to_use: Main menu branch, ending sequence, pause about screen.

menus.name: Credits Menu
menus.shared_rationale: Staff attribution and legal notices after completion or from title.
menus.summary: Scroll staff and attribution.

agent_context.gdd_prompt: Define dialogue UI layout, choice count limits, flag setting, and skip/backlog behavior.
agent_context.summary_for_agents: Dialogue menu presents lines and choices, setting story flags; pause world simulation as needed.

design_guidance.designer_notes: Flag consequential choices; support skip and backlog for repeat players.
when_to_avoid: When narrative is environmental-only with no conversation UI
design_guidance.when_to_use: When NPC conversations present branching choices or linear barks.
design_guidance.where_to_use: Speech boxes, choice wheels, visual novel layout.

menus.name: Dialogue Menu
menus.shared_rationale: Branching conversation choices with NPCs.
menus.summary: Branching conversation choices with NPCs.

agent_context.gdd_prompt: Define equipment slots, compare stats, equip restrictions, and entry from pause or bench.
agent_context.summary_for_agents: Equipment menu manages combat gear slots with validation against belt and armor rules.

design_guidance.designer_notes: Preview stat deltas and enforce slot compatibility rules.
design_guidance.when_to_use: When gear slots are complex enough to warrant a screen separate from general inventory.
design_guidance.where_to_use: Pause submenu, bench, pre-mission bay.

menus.name: Equipment Menu
menus.shared_rationale: Dedicated loadout screen for weapons, armor, and accessories.
menus.summary: Manage weapons, armor, and loadout slots.

agent_context.gdd_prompt: Map hub locations, available services after each run, meta currency displays, and run start flow.
implementation_checklist: Load hub scene after run end
Unlock services based on meta flags
Transition to run start on confirm
agent_context.summary_for_agents: Hub menu is the between-run home for meta upgrades, NPC dialogue, and starting the next attempt.

design_guidance.designer_notes: Hub should surface new dialogue, upgrades, and run start in clear priority order.
when_to_avoid: When sessions are single continuous levels without between-run home
design_guidance.when_to_use: When players return between runs to spend meta currency and advance narrative.
design_guidance.where_to_use: Post-death hub, base camp, house interstitial.

menus.name: Hub Menu
menus.shared_rationale: House of Hades hub between escape attempts.
menus.summary: Between-run home base for meta progression.

agent_context.gdd_prompt: List HUD elements, data bindings, hide rules during cinematics, and customization options.
implementation_checklist: Update each frame or on event
agent_context.summary_for_agents: HUD overlay displays core variables and prompts without pausing; tune visibility per game mode.

design_guidance.designer_notes: Minimize clutter; contextual hide during cutscenes or photo mode.
when_to_avoid: When minimal UI is a core design pillar (immersive sim exploration)
design_guidance.when_to_use: When persistent on-screen status must stay visible during gameplay.
design_guidance.where_to_use: Health bars, ammo, objectives, combo counters, minimap widgets.

menus.name: HUD Overlay
menus.shared_rationale: Persistent on-screen status and prompts.
menus.summary: Persistent on-screen status and prompts.

agent_context.gdd_prompt: List inventory categories, actions per item type, entry points (pause vs bench), and variables displayed.
implementation_checklist: Pause or slow gameplay if required
Refresh stats preview on selection change
agent_context.summary_for_agents: Inventory menu lists carried items with equip, consume, and discard actions; must reflect slot limits and related variables.

design_guidance.designer_notes: Show slot limits and stat deltas on equip; support controller navigation patterns.
when_to_avoid: When carried items are unlimited and need no inspection
design_guidance.when_to_use: When players manage carried items, equipment, or consumables during play.
design_guidance.where_to_use: Pause submenu, bench interaction, dedicated inventory key.

menus.name: Inventory Menu
menus.shared_rationale: Charm and item management screen central to buildcrafting.
menus.summary: Browse, equip, and consume carried items.

agent_context.gdd_prompt: List lobby fields, host-only controls, ready gating, and match start transition.
agent_context.summary_for_agents: Lobby menu gathers players, settings, and ready flags before match start; host authority for rules.

design_guidance.designer_notes: Host controls, role toggles, and map vote belong here before match start.
when_to_avoid: When matchmaking is fully automated with no pre-game configuration
design_guidance.when_to_use: When multiplayer sessions need pre-match player list, settings, and ready state.
design_guidance.where_to_use: Among Us lobby, FPS prematch, co-op staging.

menus.name: Lobby Menu
menus.shared_rationale: Pre-game role, color, and map voting.
menus.summary: Pre-match room for roles, cosmetics, and ready-up.

agent_context.gdd_prompt: List main menu entries, input focus order, continue gating, and transition targets.
implementation_checklist: Apply title music and input context
agent_context.summary_for_agents: Main menu routes to new game, continue, settings, and quit; gate continue on save presence.

design_guidance.designer_notes: Continue should be disabled or hidden when no save exists; surface version and accessibility links.
when_to_avoid: When launching directly into gameplay without title flow (arcade cabinets)
design_guidance.when_to_use: When the game needs a title entry point for new, continue, and settings flows.
design_guidance.where_to_use: Boot flow, return from ending, demo title screen.

menus.name: Main Menu
menus.shared_rationale: Title screen hub for starting, continuing, or configuring a game.
menus.summary: Title screen hub for starting, continuing, or configuring a game.

agent_context.gdd_prompt: Define map layers, fog rules, markers, fast travel nodes, and entry context.
agent_context.summary_for_agents: Map menu shows explored areas, objectives, and optional fast travel; sync with discovery flags.

design_guidance.designer_notes: Reveal fog progressively; pin custom markers if players set goals.
when_to_avoid: When discovery depends on unmarked exploration without map UI
design_guidance.when_to_use: When players need full map view with markers, fast travel, or fog of war.
design_guidance.where_to_use: Pause submenu, bench interaction, dedicated map key.

menus.name: Map Menu
menus.shared_rationale: Fog-of-war map with pins and bench fast travel.
menus.summary: World or stage map with markers and fast travel.

agent_context.gdd_prompt: Define overlay elements, update rate, role-specific visibility, and input to open emergency actions.
implementation_checklist: Handle report button input if applicable
Sync task progress to overlay UI
agent_context.summary_for_agents: Map overlay shows minimap, objectives, or player positions during play; tune visibility per game mode.

design_guidance.designer_notes: Decide what information is role-gated in asymmetric designs.
when_to_avoid: When spatial information must stay hidden for deduction fairness
design_guidance.when_to_use: When players need spatial context during play without a full map screen.
design_guidance.where_to_use: Minimap, task markers, fog-of-war exploration.

menus.name: Map Overlay
menus.shared_rationale: Ship minimap with task markers during play.
menus.summary: Minimap and task/route overlay during play.

agent_context.gdd_prompt: Define meeting triggers, discussion timer, chat rules, and transition to voting menu.
implementation_checklist: Auto-advance to vote on timer end
agent_context.summary_for_agents: Meeting menu hosts discussion after reports; leads to voting and must pause normal play tasks.

design_guidance.designer_notes: Time-box discussion, mute dead players, and log chat for moderation if online.
when_to_avoid: When conflict resolves purely through combat without discussion phase
design_guidance.when_to_use: When social deduction games need structured discussion after an event.
design_guidance.where_to_use: Emergency meetings, body report flows, tribunal phases.

menus.name: Meeting Menu
menus.shared_rationale: Discussion phase after body report or emergency button.
menus.summary: Emergency discussion UI after a body report.

agent_context.gdd_prompt: Document talent nodes, costs, prerequisites, refund rules, and combat impact preview.
agent_context.summary_for_agents: Mirror menu spends meta currency on permanent talents; validate prerequisites and apply modifiers at run start.

design_guidance.designer_notes: Show prerequisites and refund policy; preview stat impact before purchase.
when_to_avoid: When all progression is run-scoped with no persistent talent tree
design_guidance.when_to_use: When permanent talent trees upgrade base stats between roguelike runs.
design_guidance.where_to_use: Hub mirror, skill web, account-wide perk grid.

menus.name: Mirror Menu
menus.shared_rationale: Permanent talent tree funded by darkness.
menus.summary: Permanent meta upgrade tree between runs.

agent_context.gdd_prompt: Categorize settings (audio, video, controls, accessibility), note live vs restart apply, and defaults.
agent_context.summary_for_agents: Options menu groups settings with immediate or deferred apply; document categories and persistence.

design_guidance.designer_notes: Apply changes live where possible; mark options requiring restart.
when_to_avoid: When settings are only editable outside the game executable
design_guidance.when_to_use: When players adjust audio, video, gameplay assists, or language mid-session or from title.
design_guidance.where_to_use: Pause submenu, main menu branch, settings tab.

menus.name: Options Menu
menus.shared_rationale: System and gameplay toggles from pause.
menus.summary: Quick in-run settings for audio, display, and controls.

agent_context.gdd_prompt: List pause menu entries, input context, and which submenus preserve game state.
agent_context.summary_for_agents: Pause menu pauses simulation and routes to inventory, map, and options without losing context.

design_guidance.designer_notes: Clarify multiplayer pause policy in UI copy.
design_guidance.when_to_use: When players need to halt simulation and access subsystems mid-session.
design_guidance.where_to_use: Universal pause input during gameplay.

menus.name: Pause Menu
menus.shared_rationale: Universal session break that hosts inventory, map, and options.
menus.summary: In-game overlay to halt play and access sub-screens.

agent_context.gdd_prompt: Define slot count, autosave policy, manual save locations, and delete confirm flow.
agent_context.summary_for_agents: Save/load menu reads and writes save slots with metadata preview.

design_guidance.designer_notes: Show slot metadata: playtime, location, thumbnail if available.
design_guidance.when_to_use: When players manage multiple save slots or manual save at checkpoints.
design_guidance.where_to_use: Bench interaction, main menu continue, pause save.

menus.name: Save / Load Menu
menus.shared_rationale: Bench interaction saves progress and heals.
menus.summary: Checkpoint and slot management.

agent_context.gdd_prompt: Categorize settings, defaults, live-apply vs restart-required, and cloud sync if any.
implementation_checklist: Persist on confirm or live toggle
agent_context.summary_for_agents: Settings menu persists graphics, audio, language, and accessibility preferences.

design_guidance.designer_notes: Group settings; mark options requiring restart.
design_guidance.when_to_use: When audio, video, language, and accessibility need a dedicated meta screen.
design_guidance.where_to_use: Main menu, pause branch, launcher options.

menus.name: Settings Menu
menus.shared_rationale: Persistent player preferences spanning sessions and devices.
menus.summary: Persistent configuration from main menu or pause.

agent_context.gdd_prompt: Define stock list, prices, currency type, purchase limits, and entry context (in-run vs hub).
agent_context.summary_for_agents: Shop menu presents purchasable items against soft or hard currency; validate funds and update inventory on confirm.

design_guidance.designer_notes: Preview owned state and affordability before purchase confirm; rotate stock for roguelikes.
when_to_avoid: When economy is barter-only without currency display
design_guidance.when_to_use: When players spend currency on upgrades, maps, keys, or consumables.
design_guidance.where_to_use: NPC vendors, between-room shops, hub merchants.

menus.name: Shop Menu
menus.shared_rationale: Vendor UI spending geo on maps, charms, and keys.
menus.summary: Purchase upgrades and consumables with currency.

agent_context.gdd_prompt: Define grid layout, unlock rules, cleared indicators, and preview info per stage.
agent_context.summary_for_agents: Stage select presents choosable levels with completion state; loads selected stage on confirm.

design_guidance.designer_notes: Show cleared, available, and locked states; play selection sting on confirm.
when_to_avoid: When story mandates strict linear order with no player routing
design_guidance.when_to_use: When players choose levels or bosses in non-linear order.
design_guidance.where_to_use: World map, robot master grid, mission board.

menus.name: Stage Select Menu
menus.shared_rationale: Robot master grid with cleared stage indicators.
menus.summary: Pick levels or bosses in non-linear order.

agent_context.gdd_prompt: Specify vote options, timer, tie behavior, reveal rules, and post-vote game state changes.
implementation_checklist: Eject or skip and close overlay
agent_context.summary_for_agents: Voting menu collects player eject votes with skip option; apply elimination rules and resume play.

design_guidance.designer_notes: Always offer skip/no-vote; reveal tallies clearly to reduce perceived unfairness.
when_to_avoid: When elimination is skill-based duel without group vote
design_guidance.when_to_use: When groups must eliminate a suspect or skip after discussion.
design_guidance.where_to_use: Post-meeting vote, tribunal verdict, kick voting.

menus.name: Voting Menu
menus.shared_rationale: Eject vote tally and skip option.
menus.summary: Cast eject votes on suspected players.

agent_context.gdd_prompt: Define input for open/select, weapon list source, energy display, and whether gameplay pauses.
agent_context.summary_for_agents: Weapon select overlay swaps active weapon and displays per-weapon energy; may pause or slow combat.

design_guidance.designer_notes: Show energy or ammo per weapon; optional slow-mo during selection for accessibility.
when_to_avoid: When single-weapon design avoids mid-combat loadout changes
design_guidance.when_to_use: When players swap active weapons without leaving combat context.
design_guidance.where_to_use: Pause weapon wheel, L1/R1 cycle, quick-slot overlay.

menus.name: Weapon Select Overlay
menus.shared_rationale: Boss fight weapon wheel without leaving combat.
menus.summary: Combat overlay to swap active weapons.
